passages.passage_text: Lectures A, B, C, D, E and F are to be organised in a span of seven days from Sunday to Saturday, only one lecture on each day in accordance with the following. I. A should not be organised on Thursday. II. C should be organised immediately after F. III. There should be a gap of two days between E and D. IV. One day there will be no lecture (Friday is not that day), first before that day D will be organised. V. B should be organised on Tuesday and should not be followed by D.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.topic_name: Puzzles Based on Sequential Order of Events
questions.body: On which day, there is no lecture?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.topic_name: Puzzles Based on Sequential Order of Events
questions.body: How many lectures are organised between C and D?

solutions.solution: (C) Miss UP was the runner UP.
(D) Black saree was won by Miss Delhi.
(C) Miss Jharkhand was wearing Red saree.
